item.title: The quiet upgrade in ARQ v0.2 is model discipline.
item.summary: A note that ARQ v0.2 grows stronger by naming model scope explicitly instead of letting one theorem pretend to govern every substrate at once.
item.image_alt: An industrial room with a large frosted cabinet labeled Universal Theorem Engine beside smaller labeled modules such as Retention Model, Trust Epoch Logic, Promotion Logic, Backlog Routing, and Substrate Profile.
